D:\Programs\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\oop.dir/objects.a
D:\Programs\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\oop.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\oop.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\Programs\msys64\ucrt64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\oop.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o oop.exe -Wl,--out-implib,liboop.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\oop.dir\linkLibs.rsp
